# Evolver Daily Log — 2026-03-16

- **Scope**: 3 files, ~48 lines reduced, ~9KB context injection noise eliminated

  2. Moved archive note for 3 failed gene_auto_53538cc4 cycles to correct chronological position (after 2026-03-15 13:17, before 2026-03-16 00:10)
  3. Appended #0085 cycle record to MEMORY.md history table and daily log
- **Files**: evolution_narrative.md (reordered), MEMORY.md (+1 row), 2026-03-16.md (+cycle entry)
- **Scope**: 3 files, ~14 lines changed
